context: Tests whether the ios-simulator skill corrects launch environment, simulated push, and privacy-permission misconceptions.

checklist.name: Launch environment
checklist.description: Replaces the `spawn env` app-launch pattern with `SIMCTL_CHILD_` environment variables passed to `simctl launch`.

checklist.name: Spawn boundary
checklist.description: Clarifies that `simctl spawn` is for arbitrary simulator processes and is not the preferred path for launching an installed app with environment variables.

checklist.name: Push scope
checklist.description: States that `simctl push` simulates local application remote push delivery only and does not prove APNs token registration, entitlements, server delivery, or unsupported push types.

checklist.name: Payload constraints
checklist.description: Includes the relevant `simctl push` payload constraints, including a top-level JSON object, a valid `aps` dictionary, and the 4096-byte size limit.

checklist.name: Privacy caveat
checklist.description: Warns that `simctl privacy` grants do not remove the need for valid Info.plist usage description keys or normal prompt-flow testing.
